title: Summarizing Academic Articles
scenario: Read an academic article (approx. 500-700 words) and generate a concise 2-paragraph summary. The LLM should identify the main research question, key findings, and implications for the field. Assume the article is on a technical topic and the authors are experts in the field.
constraints: Must include the article's title and the names of the authors

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output meets all the constraints provided.
Evaluate the accuracy of the summary, including the main research question, key findings, and implications for the field.
Assess the use of academic language to accurately convey complex concepts.
Evaluate the formatting of the output, ensuring it is concise and clear.
